hook: Lightning is five times hotter than the sun.
core_fact: A lightning bolt can reach ~30,000 K, roughly five times the temperature of the sun’s surface (~5,500 K).
status_column: Idea Pool - Batch2 screened; hold for MG-lane test
visual: Lightning footage plus a sun-comparison beat. Phenomenon, not animal.
risk: Medium. The comparison beat is where the MG lane gets tested. Good cohort candidate.
source_policy: Use Higgsfield free/Ultra models for source frames; generate multiple candidates; no metered paid video without explicit approval.

must: no internal-anatomy/process beat as core visual
